Name: EASTMAN Polisher 180mm 1350W Buffer Variable Speed 1000 3000 RPM Free Carbon Set Car Detailing Marble Floor Polishing
Description: The EASTMAN ESP-180N Electric Polisher is a professional-grade tool engineered for precision detailing and heavy-duty surface finishing. Powered by a high-torque 1350W motor, this machine delivers consistent power needed for automotive detailing, furniture finishing, and stone polishing. It features a Variable Speed Switch that allows users to adjust the RPM between 1000 and 3000, ensuring the perfect speed for sensitive paintwork or aggressive compounding. With a large 180mm (7-inch) wheel diameter, it covers wider areas quickly, while the 3.20 kg weight provides the necessary downward pressure for effective buffing without excessive manual force. Designed for durability and comfort, this polisher also comes with a Free Carbon Set, making maintenance simple and extending the life of your tool.
